# United Group of Institutions (UGI, Greater Noida) Facilities - Library, Hostel, Sports, Medical, Labs and more
## Other Facilities of United Group of Institutions
United Group of Institutions (UGI) located in Greater Noida is dedicated to creating a welcoming and stimulating atmosphere for students. The campus is outfitted with an array of facilities designed to meet academic as well as recreational and general well-being needs. This is a brief overview of the **facilities that are available at UGI** which aid in a holistic learning experience:

1. **State-of-the-art infrastructure:** UGI, Greater Noida has a modern and well-designed infrastructure which has large classrooms, well-equipped labs, and modern facilities across a variety of disciplines. The design is friendly to students with a cozy and stimulating learning environment.

2. **The Library Resource Centre:** The library is an extensive library, which includes a large collection of journals, and books in addition to research papers. The library is an invaluable source for faculty and students in assisting academic research and improving their learning.

3. **Laboratory:** UGI is home to state-of-the-art laboratories across different departments that allow experiential learning and exposure. The labs are equipped with the most modern technologies and equipment, allowing students to apply their theoretical knowledge to real-world situations.

4. **Computer Labs:** Understanding the value of technology for the classroom, UGI provides dedicated computer labs that have high-speed internet connectivity. The labs are designed to support classes in computer science as well as information technology and other disciplines that are based on technology.

5. **Caféterias and dining facilities:** The campus has ample cafeterias that provide various healthy meals. These spaces are spaces for socializing where students can sit, chat with others, and eat meals. Dining facilities focus on hygiene and high quality.

6. **Sport and recreation:** UGI is a firm believer in the importance of physical and sports activities. The campus has facilities for sports for football, cricket, and basketball, as well as badminton as well as indoor sports. These facilities encourage a healthier and more active lifestyle for students.

7. **Medical Facilities:** This institution is committed to the well-being and health of students. Medical facilities are on campus to help with any health-related issues. Medical professionals with training are available to offer immediate assistance.

8. **Transport:** UGI offers transportation services to the convenience of faculty and students. The well-maintained buses ensure that you are safe and punctual in your journey between campus and other locations in the city.

9. **Wi-Fi Connectivity:** To meet the academic and research requirements of students the campus is fitted with a Wi-Fi connection. Students can access online resources and remain connected to the world academic community.

10. **Auditoriums and Conference Halls:** UGI has well-equipped auditoriums and conference halls that can be used for conferences, seminars, and other cultural events. These venues are designed to hold large groups and offer an opportunity for discussions and cultural events.

11. **Career counseling and placement support:** UGI offers career counseling to assist students in making informed decisions about their careers. The university also has a designated placement cell which facilitates interaction between potential employers and students.

12. **Innovational Learning Spaces:** It is a campus with unique learning spaces that promote collaboration in learning and innovative thinking. The areas are created to motivate students and create a lively learning atmosphere.

United Group of Institutions, Greater Noida is dedicated to providing an all-encompassing education, and the facilities available reflect this. The college is continually investing in improving and developing its infrastructure in order to meet the changing demands of faculty and students

# Udayana University

Study in Indonesia with Udayana University

Please enter your details on the below form

**Udayana University History**

Udayana University is a private university based in Denpasar Bali, Indonesia. The University was established in the year 1962 .The University was founded by Balinese King of Warmadewa Dynasty during the 10th century in order to impart higher education in Bali with less than hundred students. Presently with its daunting efforts the University has outgrown itself amongst top universities in Indonesia.

**Udayana University Programs, Courses and Schools**

Udayana University comprises of thirteen faculties, many colleges and Schools. The University offers Bachelors, Masters and Doctorate degrees in the disciplines Law, Mechanical Engineering, Liberal Arts, Humanities, Natural Sciences, Arts, Humanities, Medicine. Economics, Global Management, Healthcare, Public Administration, Veterinary Medicine, Agricultural Technology, Industrial sciences, Chemistry, Food and Nutrition, Marine Sciences, Fisheries and many more. The University owes many Research Centres all across the nation.
The University is accredited by A Status by the National Accreditation Board of Higher Education. It is also accredited by AUAP, ASEA, UNINET associations.

**Udayana University Campuses**

Udayana University owes three campuses namely Sudirman, Nias and Bukit Jimbran which is spread in hectares in the city of Denpasar. All the campuses presents state of art infrastructure and ancient architecture. The campus has several facilities for its students, a huge Dormitory, a Sports Club, a Global Lounge Room, Cafeterias, Pool Rooms and International Student office. The entire campus has a wireless network access.
The library of the University is digitalized and well furnished with latest version of books, mandates, journals and articles. The University also boasts a lending library for the general public.

**Udayana University Achievements**

Udayana University is multidisciplinary teaching and research oriented University. The University has been distinguished with many Scientific and Research awards. The University has marked an exemplary example in the world for its achievement in medicine sciences.

**Udayana University USP**

Udayana University is considered to be amongst the best Universities in Indonesia and ranks amongst top 30 Universities in Indonesia. According to Webometrics Asian Ranking Systems, the University ranks amongst top 1000 Universities in the continent. The Udayana University has an average acceptance rate. It offers very reasonable tuition fees for both international and local students. The University provides various grants and scholarships to the meritorious students.

**Udayana University Notable Alumni**

Rui Maria de Araujo (Prime Minister of East Timor), Luh Ketut (Psychiatrist), Putu Agus(Politician0, Dr H Adirozal (Deputy Mayor), I Dewe Gede Palguna (Chief Justice)
